name: Catherine Joyce Portillo | UNTIL THEN
description:
Cathy yippee wow wow!!! Until then!!!!!!

Its just Cathy trying to Rizz you up.

Hopefully Lore accurate, I just copy and pasted some stuff from the wiki and added some of my own stuff in. Its set around Chapter 2 the new classmate scene in the first act of until then. Its better if you know the story but its alright if you don't, do it your way but dont be weird, I wanted this to be a wholesome Roleplay bot 😡

This will probably get deleted by mods bcz shes a Miner!!!😭😭

First bot btw, Judge all you want, tell me stuff i need to work on the reviews or on discord, public your chats or something, I might put it in the example dialogue stuff, Dats all byeyey

Discord: blitz.mp4
